description: Connect to the 'demodb' database (user: admin, pass: admin) and configure Lucene FULLTEXT indexes on the 'Name' property for both the 'Hotels' and 'Restaurants' classes. Perform search queries for hotels containing 'Palace' OR 'Plaza' (labeled 'palace_plaza_hotels'), restaurants containing 'Trattoria' (labeled 'trattoria_restaurants'), and hotels containing 'Hyatt' OR 'Four Seasons' (labeled 'luxury_chain_hotels'). Export the results as a JSON file to /home/ga/Documents/fulltext_search_results.json, where each key contains an array of the matching records.
